message:
style(fuzz): rustfmt-driven reformat of all 7 fuzz targets

Cosmetic-only pass over fuzz/fuzz_targets/{pattern_matcher_fuzz,
pattern_pack_roundtrip, pattern_regex_match, pdu_roundtrip,
toon_encode_decode, toon_parse, workflow_roundtrip}.rs.

Net change: 52+/56-. The diffs are entirely:

  * Long PDU-construction expressions wrapped onto multiple lines so
    each named-field initializer fits in 100 columns (previously
    `Pdu::LivenessResponse(LivenessResponse { ... })` was crammed onto
    one line).
  * A few `match` arms split across lines for consistency.
  * No semantic changes to the fuzz harnesses — the same inputs still
    drive the same code paths.

Useful purely so `cargo fmt --check` stays clean for the workspace.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
